title: Corrupt mitosis plan with group-by query
poc: create table error (x int, y int, intensity int);

select
 	tilex,
 	tiley,
 	intensity,
 	count(*) as count
 from (
 	select
 		floor(x/16) as tilex,
 		floor(y/16) as tiley,
 		intensity
 	from
 		error
 ) as image
 group by
 	tilex,
 	tiley,
 	intensity
 ;
key_bug_features: group-by query on derived table causes corruption
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, x INT NOT NULL, y INT NOT NULL, intensity FLOAT CHECK (intensity >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_data (x, y, intensity) VALUES (15, 15, 1.5), (31, 31, 2.5), (47, 47, 3.5);
SELECT tilex, tiley, intensity, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT FLOOR(x/16) AS tilex, FLOOR(y/16) AS tiley, intensity FROM test_data) AS image GROUP BY tilex, tiley, intensity;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INT REFERENCES test_data(id), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO additional_data (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample description'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Another description');
